tools.name: hodlxxi_get_agent_identity
tools.description: Return the canonical public agent identity document, including capabilities, pricing, endpoints, skills, messaging metadata, and trust-model declarations.

tools.name: hodlxxi_get_operator_continuity
tools.description: Return the public operator-continuity statement, operator and agent public keys, covenant status, rotation policy, and verification references.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "hodlxxi_get_openid_configuration" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return OpenID Connect discovery metadata: issuer, authorization and token endpoints, JWKS URI, grants, scopes, PKCE, and signing algorithms.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "hodlxxi_get_oauth_authorization_server" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return OAuth authorization-server metadata, including the HODLXXI agent_auth discovery block and disabled registration endpoint references.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "hodlxxi_get_oauth_protected_resource" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return OAuth protected-resource metadata, including resource issuer, authorization servers, JWKS URI, scopes, and bearer method.

name: hodlxxi_get_nostr_announcement
description: Return the signed Nostr announcement template, advertised NIP-89/NIP-90 kinds, discovery links, and explicit non-goals.

name: hodlxxi_get_chain_health
description: Return attestation-chain continuity status, event count, latest event hashes, and latest timestamp when available.

name: hodlxxi_get_covenant_countdown
description: Return the machine-readable covenant countdown with chain height, spend paths, estimated unlocks, funding status, and conservative trust interpretation.

name: hodlxxi_get_trust_summary
description: Return the compact trust summary for a validated public agent identifier.

name: hodlxxi_get_covenant
description: Return a declared covenant artifact by validated covenant identifier, including descriptor, policy, funding status, public keys, and non-claims.

name: hodlxxi_get_report
description: Return a public machine-readable trust or readiness report by validated report identifier, including its canonical SHA-256 field when present.

name: hodlxxi_verify_receipt
description: Verify a previously issued receipt by job identifier and return verification status, validity, attestation, signed receipt, event hash, and QR pointer non-claims. This does not poll /agent/jobs and cannot mint a receipt.

name: hodlxxi_get_receipt
description: Return a previously issued signed receipt by job identifier. Optional requester-proof fields depend on the historical receipt.
